name: HP Mechanical Gaming Keyboard GK100
highlights: The HP GK100 Mechanical Keyboard delivers exceptional performance with its mechanical blue switches , providing tactile precision and a satisfying typing experience
Featuring RGB rainbow lighting with a breathing effect, this full-size keyboard offers dynamic visuals and efficient functionality for gaming and office use
Built with durable two-color injection molded keycaps and a 50 million keystroke lifespan , it ensures long-lasting reliability
The USB wired connection and ergonomic design make it the perfect choice for those seeking a high-performance mechanical keyboard for work or play
